_comment: Neutral-atom zoned architecture for the 2-bit Cuccaro ADDER at distance-3 surface-code lattice surgery (same circuit as Example/Adder2EndToEnd.lean). Qian Xu zone taxonomy (Xu et al. 2024 Nat.Phys. Fig.1; factoring layout memory+processor+factory+operation-ancilla N_A+reservoir). 81 atoms: 5 surface-code [[13,1,3]] patches = 65 data atoms (MEMORY, laid as 5 patch-rows), 12 merge ancillae (OPERATION-ANCILLA N_A), 4 |CCZ> magic atoms for the 4 Toffolis (FACTORY -- now USED, unlike a single Clifford merge). Storage SLM 0 partitioned into these zones by column band (gaps between); the ENTANGLING/processor zone (SLMs 1-2) above is where the Rydberg CZ (the merges + magic injections) fire. Distances um, durations us.
name: adder2_d3_qianxu_zoned_arch
